pluginJinaDescription: Converts any URL into LLM-friendly markdown content. Useful for reading documentation, articles, or any webpage context.
pluginWeatherDescription: Get real-time weather information including temperature, conditions, and humidity for any city.
pluginUnsplashDescription: Search for high-quality photos on Unsplash.
pluginAgnesImageDescription: Generate images with Agnes Image 2.1 Flash from text prompts or input images.
pluginAgnesVideoDescription: Create and retrieve video generation tasks with Agnes Video V2.0.
